Article Title: Watch: Riots erupt in France after 0-2 FIFA World Cup semifinal loss to Spain
Article Text:
Riots erupt in France (Image: X)

Spain outclass France to book World Cup final berth

France erupts

What's next for France?

France's 2026 FIFA World Cup dream came to a heartbreaking end after a 2-0 defeat to Spain in the semifinal at AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas, on Tuesday. However, after the loss the riots are triggered as videos are widely circulated on social media.Spain produced a composed display to end France's campaign and secure a place in the FIFA World Cup 2026 final. La Roja struck twice to seal a 2-0 victory, frustrating Didier Deschamps' side, who struggled to create clear-cut chances despite boasting attacking stars such as Kylian Mbappé.The defeat left French fans devastated as hopes of lifting a third World Cup title came to an end. Much of the post-match discussion among supporters centered on France's lack of attacking cohesion, Mbappé's subdued display, and the penalty conceded in the opening half.France descended into unrest following 2-0 defeat to Spain in the FIFA World Cup 2026 semifinal. The final whistle in Arlington, Texas, was followed by riots in parts of the French capital, with chaotic scenes unfolding on the streets.Instead of heading to the final in New Jersey, Didier Deschamps' squad must now regroup for the third-place playoff match this Saturday, July 18, 2026, where they will face the loser of the second semifinal match.The French skipper said Spain's midfield was given too much freedom, allowing La Roja to dominate possession and take control of the contest."That's what we let them do. We let the midfield too much time to play and they have the quality to play. It's difficult when you don't change the plan of Spain. The penalty helped (them) also to come in the game and then they scored the second goal and we didn't have the quality to get to the final," Mbappe added.Mbappe also accepted responsibility for the defeat, saying criticism comes with the role of captain."You take all the glory when you win, when you don't win but you have to take the blame. It's part of my game, my life, and as captain I have to take all the responsibility. We wanted to go to the final, we didn't and we have to take what people say to us," he said.
Article Summary: France's 2026 FIFA World Cup dream came to a heartbreaking end after a 2-0 defeat to Spain in the semifinal at AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas, on Tuesday. The final whistle was followed by riots in parts of the French capital, with chaotic scenes unfolding on the streets.

Article Title: Watch: Rohit Sharma's 'nataraja shot' leaves Dinesh Karthik in awe during 1st ODI vs England
Article Text:
Rohit Sharm' shot

Rohit Sharma's 'nataraja shot' leaves Dinesh Karthik in awe

Poll Vote & Share your view Which moment from the match was the most memorable? Rohit's Nataraja Shot Axar Patel's four wickets Shubman Gill's innings 3k+ users shared opinion today 5k+ users already voted today 3k+ users shared opinion today Share Opinion

India continued their dominance over England in ODI cricket, registering a sixth consecutive victory over the hosts to take a 1-0 lead in the three-match series. The visitors chased down 259 with 28 balls to spare, ending England's 12-year unbeaten run at Edgbaston in the format.While India's clinical victory grabbed the headlines, one stroke from Rohit Sharma early in the chase stole the spotlight. The veteran opener produced a trademark pull shot off Jofra Archer that left fans and commentators in awe.England had elected to bat first after winning the toss at their fortress, Edgbaston, where they had remained unbeaten in Men's ODIs since 2014. However, India's disciplined bowling restricted the hosts to 258 before the visitors completed the chase comfortably.The moment came in the sixth over of India's innings. Archer banged one in short, but Rohit was quick to read the length. He swivelled into position and dispatched the ball over square leg for a sublime boundary. The elegance of the stroke prompted commentator Dinesh Karthik to compare it to Rohit's iconic 'Nataraja Shot'a nickname inspired by the legendary pose of Lord Nataraja. As Rohit balanced on one leg after executing the pull to perfection.India brought an end to England's remarkable 12-year unbeaten run in Men's ODIs at Edgbaston with a convincing six-wicket victory on 1st ODI. The hosts made a promising start, reaching 61 without loss, before India's bowlers triggered a dramatic collapse that left them reeling at 80/5. Joe Root held the innings together with an unbeaten 76, while Liam Dawson added a valuable 68. Their 111-run partnership helped England recover to 258 before they were bowled out.Axar Patel played a pivotal role with the ball, claiming four wickets and breaking the backbone of England's batting line-up with figures of 4/62.India's pursuit was built around another assured knock from captain Shubman Gill, who scored 80 before retiring hurt with cramps. The visitors briefly lost momentum after slipping to 160/4, but Axar Patel and Washington Sundar combined to extinguish England's hopes. The pair stitched together an unbeaten 102-run stand, with Axar finishing on 57* and Sundar remaining unbeaten on 52, as India sealed victory with 28 deliveries remaining.
Article Summary: India beat England by six wickets to take 1-0 lead in three-match series. Visitors chased down 259 with 28 balls to spare at Edgbaston. Rohit Sharma's 'nataraja shot' leaves Dinesh Karthik in awe.

Article Title: After 18 years, Bangladesh-born author-in-exile Taslima Nasrin to return to Kolkata
Article Text:
Taslima, forced to leave Kol in 2007, set to return this month

Lajja

.”





KOLKATA: Eighteen years and eight months after being forced to leave Kolkata amid violent protests, Bangladesh-born author-in-exile Taslima Nasrin is set to return to the city she calls home to attend a literary meet at Rabindra Sadan on Aug 1.The organisers said Nasrin, who will arrive on July 31, is likely to be felicitated by CM Suvendu Adhikari.Speaking to TOI from New York, the author said: “Three organisations are hosting a programme to felicitate me, which is why I am returning to the city that was my home for years till I was hounded out in Nov 2007. I am feeling euphoric... finally, I am going back to Kolkata. I will be there for a couple of days, but I am open to shifting back permanently... I look forward to attending cultural events and lit fests, as Kolkata remains the cultural capital. ”Nasrin, now mostly based in Delhi, was forced to leave Kolkata in Nov 2007 following violent protests over her presence in the city.Fundamentalist groups had accused her of insulting their religion in her autobiographical work, ‘Dwikhandita’, and other writings on the treatment of women in Islamic societies.The protests, marked by blockades and arson, forced the Buddhadeb Bhattacharjee govt to deploy the Army.Fearing for her safety, the authorities shifted her out of the city and arranged her stay in safe houses outside Bengal.Observers believe the handling of the 2007 incident, which triggered discontent in a section of the minority population, and the political setbacks in Singur (2006) and Nandigram (2007) were among the key factors that unseated Left Front in 2011.Nasrin said she misses Bangladesh a lot, but doesn’t think she can ever return to the country, which has become “a land of jihadis”.“I was hounded out of Bangladesh in 1994 following death threats from Muslim clerics over my book. For 32 years, no govt there has allowed me back. My writings angered the fundamentalists, so I was thrown out,” said the physician-turned-writer.Asked how she felt when she was forced out of Bengal, Nasrin said, “I was stunned when I was told to leave Kolkata. How could the city be so cruel to me? The trauma is still fresh in my mind. CM Buddhadeb Bhattacharjee had banned Dwikhandita in 2003, but Calcutta High Court lifted the ban in Sept 2005.”In Kolkata, Nasrin plans to recite poems from her book ‘Bandini’, which she wrote when she was under house arrest in Delhi.All the poems in the book centred around Kolkata. “I had always dreamt of living in Kolkata and even bought a house in Behala, which I was forced to sell when I was evicted from the city. I also had a nice flat at 7 Rawdon Street. I loved that flat so much that I continued paying rent for two years after being forced out, hoping I would return soon.”The erstwhile Trinamool administration, she said, offered her no relief.“They did not allow me to return on the grounds that it would create law and order problems. The TMC govt even blocked the telecast of a mega-serial based on my writings, DusahabasMohit Roy, president of Paschim Banger Sange and one of the organisers of the literary meet that Nasrin is likley to attend, said the event will feature a cultural show where the author will read her poems alongside musical performances based on her work.“The CM had personally given permission for the programme and ordered tight security to thwart any potential agitation. Through this programme, we want to convey the message that Bengal is not a land of fundamentalists,” Roy said.Another organiser, advocate Osman Gani Mullick, echoed what Roy said.“It is a very proud moment for us that our favorite author Taslima Nasrin will be back in her second home. She lived here for many years and has millions of followers in the city,” said Mullick, who is a member of the committee set up to draft a uniform civil code for Bengal.Bengal BJP president and Rajya Sabha MP Samik Bhattacharya backed the move: “Yes, I had myself urged the Bengal govt to bring Taslima Nasrin back to the state. Why should her voice be choked? She authored Lajja, highlighting the persecution of Hindus in Bangladesh.”However, senior lawyer and CPM’s former Rajya Sabha MP Bikash Ranjan Bhattacharya accused the author of toeing the Hindutva line.“Taslima Nasrin is welcome here. But in her recent speeches she has been toeing the rabid Hindutva line... The day she starts speaking against Hindutva, she will realise she is unwelcome here under the current regime.”
Article Summary: Author-in-exile Taslima Nasrin is set to return to the city she calls home to attend a literary meet at Rabindra Sadan on Aug 1. Nasrin, who will arrive on July 31, is likely to be felicitated by CM Suvendu Adhikari. She was forced to leave Kolkata in Nov 2007 following violent protests over her presence in the city.

Article Title: Argentina vs England: Why FBI labelled this FIFA World Cup semi-final the 'highest-risk' match
Article Text:
Argentina's Lionel Messi; and England's Harry Kane during the FIFA World Cup 2026. (AP Photos)

ALSO READ:

A rivalry forged by war and football



From the 'Hand of God' to Beckham's red card



England's FIFA World Cup semifinal against Argentina has been designated the highest-risk fixture of the tournament, with the FBI, FIFA and local law enforcement rolling out extraordinary security measures as one of football's fiercest rivalries takes centre stage in Atlanta.As per reports, officials from the FBI, FIFA and the Atlanta Police Department met earlier this week to assess potential threats surrounding Wednesday night's blockbuster clash at the Mercedes-Benz Stadium. The concern extends beyond football, with decades of political tensions and historic flashpoints raising fears that emotions could spill over among supporters.To minimise the risk of confrontations, England and Argentina fans will enter the stadium through separate gates. However, organisers have confirmed there will be no segregation once inside the venue, where supporters will be seated together due to the widespread use of ticket resale platforms.Atlanta Police have also deployed additional personnel around the stadium, team hotels and entertainment districts."As Atlanta prepares to host an upcoming FIFA World Cup semi-final match... additional personnel and resources are already deployed...to help ensure a safe and enjoyable experience for everyone," the department said in a statement.The rivalry between England and Argentina stretches far beyond the pitch and remains deeply intertwined with the 1982 Falklands War, which claimed 907 lives after Argentina invaded the islands before Britain regained control.Political tensions resurfaced this week when Argentina's foreign minister reiterated the country's claim over the Falkland Islands, a move swiftly rejected by British Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer's government.The conflict has also found its way into football culture during the tournament. Argentina's players have repeatedly celebrated victories by singing songs referencing the Falklands, known in Argentina as Las Malvinas.However, Argentina coach Lionel Scaloni attempted to cool the rhetoric ahead of the semifinal."The message to the Argentine people is that this is a soccer match. We're going to face a great team with a great coach, but it is just a soccer match, nothing more than that," Scaloni said.Few football rivalries carry as much baggage as England versus Argentina.Their most iconic meeting came at the 1986 World Cup, when Diego Maradona scored the infamous "Hand of God" goal before producing the stunning solo effort widely regarded as the greatest goal in World Cup history.Maradona later admitted using his hand and described the incident as "some sort of symbolic revenge against the English" for the Falklands War.The hostility predates 1982. During the 1966 World Cup quarterfinal, England manager Alf Ramsey famously labelled Argentina's players "animals" after a fiery encounter that saw captain Antonio Rattin sent off and escorted from the field by police.The rivalry flared again at France 1998 when David Beckham 's red card against Diego Simeone contributed to England's penalty shootout defeat.With history, politics and football colliding once again, authorities are taking no chances. For the FBI and tournament organisers, England versus Argentina is not just another World Cup semifinal — it is the most sensitive fixture of the competition, demanding an unprecedented level of security to ensure that one of football's greatest rivalries remains confined to the pitch.
Article Summary: England's FIFA World Cup semifinal against Argentina has been designated the highest-risk fixture of the tournament. FBI, FIFA and local law enforcement have rolled out extraordinary security measures as one of football's fiercest rivalries takes centre stage in Atlanta. To minimise the risk of confrontations, England and Argentina fans will enter the stadium through separate gates.

Article Title: Las Vegas Raiders Free Agency Rumors: NFL analyst Mina Kimes urges Tom Brady’s team to pursue New England Patriots $27M wide receiver
Article Text:
Las Vegas Raiders Trade Rumors: ESPN NFL analyst Mina Kimes urges Tom Brady’s franchise to pursue New England Patriots $27M wide receiver (Image 1 via X, Image 2 via Getty: Las Vegas Raiders logo and New England Patriots logo)

Stefon Diggs would be an upgrade for Las Vegas Raiders, Washington Commanders or Kansas City Chiefs

Stefon Diggs free agency rumors

Category Details Player Stefon Diggs Current Team None. He was released by the New England Patriots in March 2026. Rumored Teams Kansas City Chiefs, Las Vegas Raiders, Baltimore Ravens, Washington Commanders, and Tennessee Titans. Contract Status UFA [unrestricted free agent] Spotrac Calculated Market Value Two years, $27 million contract with $13 million average annual salary Free Agency Signing Likelihood Moderate to High Latest Insider Update ESPN insider Jeremy Fowler

ESPN insider Jeremy Fowler links Stefon Diggs to Washington Commanders and Baltimore Ravens

ESPN NFL analyst Mina Kimes has been actively pitching Stefon Diggs to the Tom Brady-part-owned Las Vegas Raiders over the past few months.In May, Kimes said that the Raiders’ receiving group is “pretty thin.”And when a young quarterback like Fernando Mendoza starts, “it would really help him to have a receiver like Diggs, who he can rely on in those situations.”Like, Diggs helped Drake Maye in the New England Patriots? Maybe.Then, in June, another ESPN NFL analyst Aaron Schatz picked Diggs for Las Vegas, citing the Raiders’ receiver depth as severely lacking.Diggs was still good enough to finish second among wideouts last season in ESPN Analytics’ receiver room. Diggs for the Raiders seems like a “no-brainer.”Then, in July, Mina Kimes again pitched for the 32-year-old veteran WR, saying,“When I look at teams across the NFL like Las Vegas and their wide receiver group, Washington, or Kansas City, to name a few, I absolutely think they should be on the phone about Stefon Diggs because he would be an upgrade for them.”What else did the analyst say? Let’s find out.On the July 13 episode of NFL Live, Mina Kimes discussed how Stefon Diggs would be an upgrade for several teams, such as the Las Vegas Raiders, Washington Commanders, and Kansas City Chiefs, based solely on his 2025 performance.He recorded 85 receptions on 100 targets for 1,013 receiving yards, 4 touchdowns, and an average of 11.9 yards per catch.He earned an 87.5 overall PFF [Pro Football Focus] grade, which ranked him 6th among 81 qualified wide receivers.The ESPN NFL analyst further said Diggs had an 83 percent catch rate; he led all the receivers. He was third in yards per route.He may not have as much juice left in him at 32 as he did in his prime, but “he is still an exceptional route runner.”And as evidenced by the catch rate, he has elite hands.ESPN insider Jeremy Fowler reported he is hearing Stefon Diggs will have a market closer to training camp.At least five teams that need wide receiver help have checked in on him.Of those, two are the Washington Commanders and the Baltimore Ravens. All the interested teams have to do is “deal with some of the baggage and headlines.”But ESPN insider Jeremy Fowler says Diggs is confident because he recorded 1,000-plus receiving yards last season.He was playing on a snap count of around 55 percent, coming off an ACL injury he suffered on October 27, 2024. He managed a 1,000-plus season after the ACL tear.He is confident this time because he feels he will be even better. What is better than a 1000-plus-yard season? [add a shocking emoji here].Anyhow, ESPN insider Jeremy Fowler said he was looking at the Washington Commanders because that’s where Stefon Diggs is from.The Washington Commanders are looking for more of a speed option at this point. There are several veterans they could consider. And one of them is Diggs.
Article Summary: ESPN NFL analyst Mina Kimes has been actively pitching Stefon Diggs to the Tom Brady-part-owned Las Vegas Raiders over the past few months. Diggs was still good enough to finish second among wideouts last season in ESPN Analytics’ receiver room. At least five teams that need wide receiver help have checked in on him.

Article Title: NHL trade rumor: Edmonton Oilers linked to three-time Stanley Cup champion Patrick Kane in free agency
Article Text:
Patrick Kane named as an option for the Edmonton Oilers (Image via: Getty Images)

Edmonton Oilers identified as potential landing spots for veteran winger Patrick Kane

The Edmonton Oilers have been identified as a potential landing spot for veteran winger Patrick Kane as the franchise is planning to strengthen its roster ahead of the 2026-27 NHL season. Speculation is doing the rounds that the Edmonton Oilers are among the best fits for the three-time Stanley Cup Champion, owing to the Oilers' championship aspirations and Kane's proven offensive game. Previously, the Detroit Red Wings tried to convince Kane to stay by offering him a contract or presenting reasons to remain with the team. However, it appears he has decided to move on and is likely to sign with a fourth NHL franchise.As recent speculation suggests, the Edmonton Oilers identified a potential landing spot for veteran winger Patrick Kane . It is important to note that Patrick Kane is an Unrestricted Free Agent, and his last contract was 1 year, $3,000,000 with a cap hit of $3,000,000 per season. His contract expired at the end of the 2025-26 season.Latest reports suggest that the Detroit Red Wings tried to convince Kane to stay by offering him a contract with the team.However, it appears he has decided to move on and is likely to sign with a fourth NHL franchise with the Buffalo Sabres. It is to be noted that the Buffalo Sabres are his hometown club.Not only that, but even the Toronto Maple Leafs are also planning to consider him for their team, but reports suggest that the talks are still at a very early stage.Kane has been a reliable veteran player for the Detroit Red Wings since joining the club in the 2023-24 season. Though injuries limited him to 67 games this season, he still had 57 points with 16 goals and 41 assists in 67 games, to finish fifth among their leading scorers the previous season.Amid the offseason, the Edmonton Oilers have already improved their roster somewhat, but they still have enough salary cap space to make another significant signing that could make the team even stronger.After defenseman Darnell Nurse left the team, Edmonton has signed or acquired players such as Mathieu Joseph and Ryan Shea. These are viewed as useful but not blockbuster additions. Despite these additions, reports suggest the club is still left with enough cap space to make one or two more interesting acquisitions, such as signing a veteran free agent like Patrick Kane or making a trade.Meanwhile, Kane is also widely expected to be inducted into the Hockey Hall of Fame as soon as he becomes eligible. Not only this, but Kane has also won the Hart Trophy, Conn Smythe Trophy, and Art Ross Trophy during his illustrious career.His championship experience has made him an attractive option for contenders despite entering the latter stages of his career. Despite his age, he is still an effective player and can strengthen a team's power play with his playmaking ability.Although no agreement has been reported, Kane continues to draw interest from several teams, and Edmonton could emerge as one of the strongest contenders if it decides to pursue the NHL star.
Article Summary: Edmonton Oilers identified as potential landing spot for veteran winger Patrick Kane. Speculation is doing the rounds that the Edmonton Oilers are among the best fits for the three-time Stanley Cup Champion. Previously, the Detroit Red Wings tried to convince Kane to stay by offering him a contract. However, it appears he has decided to move on and is likely to sign with a fourth NHL franchise with the Buffalo Sabres.

Article Title: Minor in CWG squad: Para cyclist Lisha Das raises safety concerns over no woman support staff
Article Text:
Lisha Das (Pic credit: NVS India)

NEW DELHI: India’s Commonwealth Games (CWG) contingent has come under scrutiny after the youngest member of the 191-strong squad, 16-year-old para track cyclist Lisha Das expressed “profound disappointment” over the absence of a woman coach or support staff in the track and para track cycling contingent, raising safety and security concerns for a minor athlete travelling overseas.In emails to the sports authorities, Lisha wrote: “I am writing this email with profound disappointment… I am a minor female para athlete. I required a female escort and medical support professional. We submitted the parental consent form naming Asha Shaikh, my physiotherapist, as my accompanying support personnel... Proper coaching, medical support, athlete safety and athlete welfare should have been the highest priority. ”"Despite several representations from my parents, my coach, and me, this issue remains unresolved, while responsibility continues to be shifted between organizations. It is extremely unfortunate that the athlete continues to suffer while authorities engage in a blame game. One of the most disappointing aspects of this entire episode is the continuous shifting of responsibility. Whenever issues arise: CFI states that it is PCI’s responsibility.PCI states that it is CFI’s responsibility. Neither I nor my parents should be held responsible for this administrative failure,” she added.The CWG contingent, cleared by the sports ministry on July 9, comprises 126 athletes, 51 officials and 14 contingent staff. While every other discipline has at least one woman coach, physiotherapist or medical staff member, cycling and para cycling are the only disciplines without female support personnel.The omission appears inconsistent with the Sports Authority of India’s June 15, 2022 circular mandating a woman coach in contingents with female athletes during domestic and international camps and competitions, besides appointing male and female compliance officers to safeguard women athletes.Four years ago, when the country’s sports administration was rocked by two harassment complaints by female athletes in cycling and sailing disciplines against their respective coaches, the Sports Authority of India (SAI) had come up with an office circular on June 15, 2022, with a view to keep the sport safe and free of harassment and discrimination for women athletes.“Women coach to mandatorily be a part of the contingent with female athletes during domestic/international camps and competition exposures; and compliance officer (male & female) to be appointed in all national coaching camps and foreign exposures,” read the SAI’s office order.It may be recalled that the Indian cricket board (BCCI) recently allowed 15-year-old batter Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s parents to accompany him on India’s tour of Ireland and England, with expenses borne by the board to ensure compliance with child safeguarding norms and ease his transition into a senior environment.The four-member support staff accompanying the cycling contingent comprises male coach Kevin Rene Michel Sireau, male physiotherapist Prahlad Priyadarshi, male technician Rahul Nagappan Assari and male para cycling coach Dattatraya Katkam.However, in a late development, Lisha’s long-time coach Aditya Jitendra Kumar Mehta has “substituted” Dattatreya in the official contingent. Dattatreya currently is a Cycling Federation of India (CFI) office-bearer and can only travel at ‘no cost to govt’ following a ministry’s recent directive on NSF officials travelling with the CWG-bound contingent.However, Lisha’s key demands remain unmet: appointment of a woman coach or support staff, inclusion of physiotherapist Asha, and a technician to assemble and maintain her specialised racing bicycle.
Article Summary: 16-year-old para track cyclist Lisha Das expressed “profound disappointment’ over the absence of a woman coach or support staff in the track and para track cycling contingent. The omission appears inconsistent with the Sports Authority of India’s June 15, 2022 circular.

Article Title: Who is Ismail Elfath? Everything to know about the England vs Argentina World Cup semifinal referee
Article Text:
Ismail Elfath (Image Via Getty)

Ismail Elfath brings years of experience to England vs Argentina World Cup semifinal

Why Ismail Elfath’s appointment has become a talking point before England vs Argentina

The 2026 FIFA World Cup semifinal between England and Argentina will have another key figure besides the players. FIFA has appointed American referee Ismail Elfath to take charge of the high-pressure clash in Atlanta. While Elfath is one of FIFA’s most experienced officials, his selection has drawn extra attention because refereeing decisions in Argentina’s recent World Cup matches have already sparked debate. That means every decision he makes on Wednesday will be watched closely.Ismail Elfath is no stranger to football’s biggest stage. Born in Morocco, he moved to the United States as a teenager and later became a FIFA-listed referee in 2016 after building his career in Major League Soccer.Before becoming a full-time referee, he earned a mechanical engineering degree from the University of Texas.The England vs Argentina match will be his fourth game at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Earlier in the tournament, he officiated Netherlands vs Japan, Brazil vs Norway, and Uruguay vs Spain.The Uruguay-Spain match was especially physical, and Elfath sent off Uruguay’s Agustín Canobbio after a tough challenge.His World Cup experience goes back to Qatar in 2022, where he handled several matches and was also the fourth official for the unforgettable final between Argentina and France.FIFA has again shown its trust in him by giving him one of the biggest matches of this tournament.Another milestone comes with this appointment. For the first time in World Cup history, two referees from CONCACAF have been chosen to officiate the tournament’s two semifinal matches.Elfath himself has not been at the center of the biggest refereeing controversies in this World Cup.However, he steps into a match that already carries plenty of pressure because Argentina’s victories over Egypt and Switzerland led to strong reactions over several officiating decisions.Fans, former players, and media outlets questioned some of those calls, keeping referees under heavy scrutiny ahead of the semifinal.His appointment has also become a topic because Lionel Messi has never lost a match officiated by Elfath since joining Inter Miami, while the American official was also the fourth referee during Argentina’s 2022 World Cup final win.Some supporters have pointed to that record, although FIFA’s refereeing chief, Pierluigi Collina, has defended the integrity and independence of match officials.With one of football’s oldest rivalries returning to the World Cup stage, Elfath will have little room for error. Every foul, booking, penalty appeal and VAR decision is likely to be examined, making his performance almost as important as the football itself.
Article Summary: Ismail Elfath has been appointed as the referee for the 2026 FIFA World Cup semifinal between England and Argentina. Elfath is one of FIFA's most experienced officials. His appointment has drawn extra attention because refereeing decisions in Argentina’s recent World Cup matches have already sparked debate.

Article Title: Who is Ben Rice's father? Meet Dan Rice, the pitcher behind the Yankees star's Home Run Derby debut
Article Text:
Who is Ben Rice's father? Meet Dan Rice, the pitcher behind the Yankees star's Home Run Derby debut(Getty)

Who is Dan Rice?

Ben Rice and Dan Rice share a special home run derby experience

Ben Rice's first appearance in the MLB Home Run Derby lasted only one round, but the night became about much more than the final score. Standing on the mound and throwing every pitch was his father, Dan Rice, turning the event into one of the most memorable father-son moments of All-Star Week.The New York Yankees slugger managed seven home runs before being eliminated, but both Ben and Dan made it clear that simply sharing the field together at Citizens Bank Park was a victory in itself.Dan Rice is the father of Yankees first baseman and designated hitter Ben Rice. Although he has stayed out of the public spotlight, he has been one of the biggest influences on his son's baseball career.Rice is an attorney with more than 30 years of legal experience. Before entering the legal profession, he pitched for Brown University from 1983 to 1986 and graduated from the Ivy League school in 1986. He was later inducted into the Boston Park League Hall of Fame in recognition of his amateur baseball career.Baseball runs deep in the Rice family. Dan's father, Gordon "Gordy" Rice, was a longtime youth coach in Westwood and a familiar face at local sporting events. His brother, Dave Rice, also made a name for himself as a baseball and hockey player.Growing up in that environment helped fuel Dan's love for sports, a passion he later passed on to Ben through years of batting practice and mentorship.Dan has served as Ben's batting practice pitcher since childhood. Even during the COVID-19 pandemic, when Ben's college season at Dartmouth was interrupted, he continued throwing batting practice to help him stay sharp before the Yankees selected him in the 12th round of the 2021 MLB Draft.Ben has often said those sessions were never about perfect mechanics. Instead, his father challenged him by mixing pitch speeds and locations, helping him prepare for real game situations. Despite Ben's rise to the major leagues, Dan has kept his personal life private, but recently he stole the spotlight during a special Home Run Derby moment.When Ben Rice received his first All-Star selection in 2026, choosing his Home Run Derby pitcher was an easy decision. He turned to the person who had thrown him batting practice for most of his life. The father-son duo prepared together at Yankee Stadium and Nationals Park before arriving in Philadelphia. Ben entered the Derby after hitting 29 home runs during the first half of the season and hoped to carry that power into baseball's biggest home run competition.The Derby itself ended quickly, with Ben finishing the opening round with seven home runs. Even so, he later admitted that the adrenaline of the event and the loud reaction from the hometown Phillies crowd made the experience unforgettable.Before the competition, Ben said the event was already a success because he and his father were getting to share the moment together. Dan echoed those feelings afterward, saying there was nothing better than hearing his son drive baseballs into the seats of a major league stadium.Although the Home Run Derby did not end with a trophy, it gave Ben and Dan Rice a lifelong memory, highlighting the bond that helped carry the Yankees slugger from batting practice sessions in Massachusetts to baseball's biggest power stage.
Article Summary: Dan Rice is the father of Yankees first baseman and designated hitter Ben Rice. Dan has served as Ben's batting practice pitcher since childhood. The father-son duo prepared together at Yankee Stadium and Nationals Park. Ben entered the Derby after hitting 29 home runs during the first half of the season.

Article Title: Fact check: Did Portuguese superstar Cristiano Ronaldo confirm he will play in the 2030 World Cup because it will be held in Portugal?
Article Text:
The 41 year old Portuguese star Cristiano Ronaldo has seemingly played his last World Cup as it has left fans heartbroken across the world sparking chaos among fans. While billions of fans are convinced that Cristiano Ronaldo might return to the field for the 2030 World Cup, he has remained distant. Amid this, a rumor of his comment on the 2030 World Cup has sparked chaos.

Has Cristiano Ronaldo spoken about playing in the 2030 World Cup amid Portugal’s brutal end on the field?



Cristiano Ronaldo and his family spoke about 2026 being his last run for World Cup



The 41 year old Portuguese star Cristiano Ronaldo has seemingly played his last World Cup as it has left fans heartbroken across the world. While billions of fans are convinced that Cristiano Ronaldo might return to the field for the 2030 World Cup, he has remained distant. Amid this, a rumor of his comment on the 2030 World Cup has sparked chaos.No, the Portuguese legend Cristiano Ronaldo has not expressed his desire to play in the 2030 World Cup since it will be hosted in Portugal.A few hours ago, a fan page on X made a post that read as, “Cristiano Ronaldo is seriously considering participating in the 2030 World Cup because it will be in Portugal and the chances of winning it will be high…”But this post seems entirely fake since there are no insider reports which confirm if Cristiano Ronaldo is thinking of returning to the field in 2030.The fake post has now sparked chaos among fans. A fan took to X and posted, “It's all because of Messi, he got us busy with this utter trash. If he hadn't brought it in 2022, this guy would've retired ages ago.”Another fan wrote, “He should do himself some good and just pull out It may not be his destiny…”A third fan posted, “Ronaldo needs a psychologist to convince him of his age and focus on a new phase with business and organized work.”Another fan noted, “You people want CR7 to die because of world cup, allow the old man to rest please…”A fifth fan wrote, “Homeboy couldn't win it in his prime and he thinks now is the time he can with Haaland and Mbappe running football rn,this man is unintentionally funny ngl…”However, Cristiano Ronaldo has not commented on the speculations yet as he focuses on his family.A few days ago, as Portugal’s run on the field came to a brutal end, Cristiano Ronaldo opened up about it and said, "It will be my last World Cup, yes. I'm going to enjoy it…"In another interview, the Portuguese superstar Cristiano Ronaldo’s sister commented on it as she said, "Enjoy it while it lasts…”She added, “It's not today that he's saying goodbye, but it's soon. I believe this is his farewell. Enjoy it a lot. It will be difficult to find someone like him. After a thousand goals? Yes, that's something. I'm talking about the National Team. The information I have, from a reliable source, I believe this is his last dance."
Article Summary: The 41 year old Portuguese star Cristiano Ronaldo has seemingly played his last World Cup as it has left fans heartbroken across the world. Amid this, a rumor of his comment on the 2030 World Cup has sparked chaos. A few hours ago, a fan page on X made a post that read as, “Cristiano Ronaldo is seriously considering participating in the 1930 World Cup because it will be in Portugal and the chances of winning will be high…” But this post seems entirely fake since there are no insider reports which confirm if Ronaldo is thinking of returning to the field in 2030.

Article Title: Machine Gun Kelly reignites Conor McGregor feud with brutal Instagram rant after UFC 329 loss to Max Holloway
Article Text:
Machine Gun Kelly and Conor McGregor (Image Via Getty)

Machine Gun Kelly takes aim at Conor McGregor after UFC 329 defeat

How the Machine Gun Kelly and Conor McGregor feud started in 2021

Machine Gun Kelly has reignited his long-running feud with Conor McGregor, just days after the former UFC champion suffered a defeat and injury against Max Holloway at UFC 329. The rapper, whose real name is Colson Baker, shared a series of Instagram posts mocking McGregor and even brought up their infamous 2021 MTV Video Music Awards confrontation. His comments quickly drew attention, with some people criticizing him for targeting McGregor after his latest setback.Machine Gun Kelly did not hold back in his latest Instagram posts. He first shared photos and clips, including footage from his 2021 red carpet clash with McGregor and images related to the Irish fighter’s injury from his UFC 329 bout against Max Holloway.He wrote, “knees weak of old age the real conor can’t stand up @thenotoriousmma.” The rapper then posted another video and made it clear that he had no plans to apologize.“I’m aware I did a post yesterday and I should probably apologize for absolutely nothing, homie. F*** this dude, that’s how beef works. We don’t like each other,” Kelly said.He added, “We don’t age the same, my knees are awesome.” Kelly also claimed there was more footage from the 2021 incident that people never got to see.“Where the f*** is the rest of the footage where we toss this little guy like a piece of dirty drawls across the red carpet? That’s why all the footage starts with him far away,” he said.Some social media users felt Kelly was mocking McGregor while he was already dealing with an injury. However, the rapper continued and ended his video by saying, “Thank you for the walkout being longer than the fight. You wasting everyone’s time. It’s pissing me off.”The tension between Machine Gun Kelly and Conor McGregor goes back to the MTV Video Music Awards in September 2021 at the Barclays Center in Brooklyn.The two had a heated confrontation on the red carpet and security stepped in before the situation got worse. At the time, Megan Fox, who was Kelly’s partner then, was also seen pulling him away from the scene.After the incident, McGregor dismissed the clash during an interview with Entertainment Tonight. “Absolutely nothing happened. I don’t know. He showed up, and I don’t know. I don’t know the guy,” McGregor said.He continued, “Nothing happened with me, I only fight real fighters, people that actually fight, you know what I mean? I certainly don’t fight little vanilla boy rappers. I don’t even know the guy. I don’t know anything about him, except that he’s with Megan Fox.”There were different reports about how the argument began. TMZ reported that McGregor had asked Kelly for a photo before the situation turned tense. However, McGregor’s spokesperson later told the Daily Mail that the UFC star never asked for a picture and did not start the confrontation.
Article Summary: Machine Gun Kelly has reignited his long-running feud with Conor McGregor. The rapper shared a series of Instagram posts mocking McGregor. He even brought up their infamous 2021 MTV Video Music Awards confrontation. McGregor suffered a defeat and injury against Max Holloway at UFC 329.

Asmongold reveals his house is finally free from roaches after major changes

“alarm clock.”

Asmongold revealed that he added new siding, renovated parts of his home, and plans to hire a professional cleaner to handle the remaining mess. These changes included adding new siding to the house and completely renovating the upstairs area. He also joked in the past about avoiding showers for a long time.Although Asmongold has managed to remove the roach problem, he admitted that his house is still very dirty. The streamer said he is now planning to hire a professional cleaner to properly clean the remaining mess.Asmongold said.He also joked that the roaches had beenfrom his home after finally disappearing.While Asmongold has cleaned parts of his house before, hiring professional help shows that he wants to make bigger changes. What are insiders saying about the rumors?



How will this impact the teams?



The former New England Patriots’ wide receiver Stefon Diggs witnessed a brutal loss in the Super Bowl against the Seattle Seahawks but his performance had impressed many across the league. While Stefon Digs dealt with a controversial legal drama, he was released by the New England Patriots just days after the Super Bowl loss. Ahead of the new season, the Baltimore Ravens and the New York Giants have been reported to be eyeing him.In the last few weeks, Kansas City chiefs, Buffalo Bills and the Baltimore Ravens and the New York Giants have been linked to him and are reportedly eyeing him.A few hours ago, James Brizuela of Roundtable Sports noted in a recent report, “Most teams often wait to see how training camp begins to unfold before they start making moves, and the Ravens have been tabbed on being a landing spot for Stefon Diggs.The Ravens and Diggs have been connected to one another for weeks and months, but Diggs may still be a bit more prolific than the former Baltimore pass catcher.”Andrew Buller-Russ of Sportsnaut noted in another report, “There’s no telling who will stand out from the pack, but if Malik Nabers really won’t be available by Week 1, then Jaxson Dart will need all the help he can get. Article Title: Why are MLB fans calling Will Ferrell’s Home Run Derby cameo ‘painful’ despite Netflix’s big promotion?
Article Text:
Why are MLB fans calling Will Ferrell’s Home Run Derby cameo ‘painful’ despite Netflix’s big promotion? (Image via Getty)

The Hawk

Will Ferrell, Luke Wilson and Jimmy Tatro’s Home Run Derby segment draws criticism

Rocky

The Hawk

MLB fans react as social media calls the Netflix crossover ‘cringe’

The Athletic

Netflix’s first year broadcasting the MLB Home Run Derby was supposed to bring a fresh feel to one of baseball’s biggest events. Instead, much of the conversation online centered on an unexpected guest. Actor Will Ferrell appeared during player introductions at Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia, but many viewers felt the segment took attention away from the derby itself. Ferrell showed up as Lonnie “The Hawk” Hawkins, a character from his upcoming Netflix comedy series, alongside co-stars Luke Wilson and Jimmy Tatro. What was meant to be a fun promotional crossover quickly drew criticism from fans, many of whom described the segment as awkward, hard to follow, and simply unnecessary.The opening ceremony had started on a strong note. Legendary ring announcer Michael Buffer introduced the eight Home Run Derby participants as they walked toward a boxing-ring-style stage set up near home plate in Philadelphia. The boxing-themed entrance was part of a tribute connected to the city and the 50th anniversary ofSoon after, Ferrell, Wilson and Tatro joined the broadcast to promote, which premieres on Netflix this week. Ferrell stayed in character as Lonnie “The Hawk” Hawkins while the trio offered jokes and commentary during player introductions.The problem, according to many viewers, was that the segment never seemed to find its rhythm. Several moments overlapped with Buffer’s introductions, making it difficult to hear either side clearly. Fans also pointed to audio issues that left some of the jokes hard to understand.As the broadcast continued, criticism quickly spread across social media.One fan wrote, “Maybe I’m way off, but I don’t think the Will Ferrell-Luke Wilson thing is working at all. Honestly, I get the sense that they also know it isn’t working.”Another viewer said, “Love Will Ferrell, but we don’t need him here and can’t hear him on the broadcast. Cross promotion has its limits.”Sports media voices also weighed in. Andrew Marchand ofposted, “Will Ferrell and company may want to say something funny.”Other reactions were even harsher. One fan wrote, “I can’t believe Netflix ruined the Home Run Derby and Will Ferrell in the first 10 minutes.”Another post read, “This was a difficult watch. Just bad. I like these guys, but this was an awkward fit. I just don’t know if all this extra stuff is needed.”Not every viewer disliked the appearance, but the overall reaction leaned negative. Many fans felt the focus should have stayed on the hitters and the competition rather than a promotional segment for a new show. The criticism also added to broader complaints about Netflix’s first Home Run Derby broadcast, with some viewers questioning parts of the production and presentation.
Article Summary: Will Ferrell appeared during player introductions at Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia. Many viewers felt the segment took attention away from the derby itself. Ferrell showed up as Lonnie “The Hawk” Hawkins, a character from his upcoming Netflix comedy series.

Article Title: Why did AI turn Kylian Mbappé into a ‘dictator’? Strange kebab row fuels meme
Article Text:
Why did AI turn Kylian Mbappé into a ‘dictator’? Strange kebab row fuels meme (Image via Getty)

How Kylian Mbappé’s dispute with Mohammed Henni sparked the meme

Why the ‘ Dictator Mbappé ’ meme continued to grow online

Kylian Mbappé’s face has recently appeared in hundreds of AI-generated memes showing him as a military ruler giving orders, leading armies, and controlling everything around him. What looks like a random internet joke actually has a surprising backstory. The viral “Dictator Mbappé” meme can be traced back to a dispute in 2024 involving a kebab shop owner in France. What started as a legal complaint over the use of Mbappé’s name for a sandwich slowly turned into one of the internet’s strangest football jokes, with AI creators taking the idea to increasingly absurd levels.The story goes back to March 2024 when Marseille-based influencer and kebab shop owner Mohammed Henni received a legal notice linked to a sandwich named after Mbappé.Henni, who has more than two million followers on Instagram, had promoted a kebab using the footballer’s name. He also described the sandwich as being served in “bread as round as Mbappé’s skull.” The joke did not go down well with the player’s camp.Mbappé’s lawyers reportedly asked for the reference to be removed. The move immediately attracted attention online. Instead of quietly ending the matter, Henni publicly mocked the legal notice.In videos shared on social media, he questioned why a football star would focus on a sandwich joke and dismissed the legal action.That public exchange became meme material. Many social media users began joking that Mbappé was acting like a strict ruler who would not tolerate even the smallest criticism. The “Dictator Mbappé” nickname soon appeared across platforms, first as jokes and edited images and later as elaborate AI-generated videos.As AI tools became more popular, creators pushed the idea even further. Videos started showing Mbappé in military uniforms, directing troops, leading marches, and delivering speeches. Some clips even featured fictional national anthems and crowds saluting him, turning the joke into a full internet universe.The meme survived because it expanded beyond the kebab dispute. Online users began linking it to Mbappé’s image as one of football’s biggest stars and his strong presence on and off the pitch.Posts started joking that he controlled everything around him, from teammates and coaches to referees and football authorities. Clips from matches were edited to fit that narrative, while old football moments were given humorous voiceovers portraying him as a commanding leader.Several compilation videos labelled as Mbappé’s “best dictator moments” spread widely online. The joke became less about the original sandwich dispute and more about a fictional version of the player created by internet culture.Eventually, the meme became so popular that it reached Mbappé himself during a press conference. A reporter referenced criticism that he was too controlling within his teams and even mentioned the dictator joke directly.Mbappé made it clear that he was not amused. Responding to the question, he said, “This is a complete farce that you and stupid comedians like you share because you think you are funny.”His response only brought more attention to the meme. While many internet jokes disappear within days, this one kept growing because new AI-generated versions continued appearing online.More than two years after the kebab dispute first surfaced, the “Dictator Mbappé” meme remains one of football’s most unusual viral trends, showing how a disagreement over a sandwich unexpectedly evolved into a global internet joke.
Article Summary: Kylian Mbappé has appeared in hundreds of AI-generated memes showing him as a military ruler giving orders, leading armies, and controlling everything around him. The meme can be traced back to a dispute in 2024 involving a kebab shop owner in France. What started as a legal complaint over the use of the footballer's name for a sandwich slowly turned into one of the internet’s strangest football jokes, with AI creators taking the idea to increasingly absurd levels.

Article Title: Fact check: Did Kayla Nicole reveal Travis Kelce cheated on her with a friend?
Article Text:
A viral social media post falsely claimed Kayla Nicole accused Travis Kelce of cheating with her friend and sacrificing $5 million for him. However, there is no verified evidence supporting the affair allegations, financial claims, or attributed quotes. Nicole never publicly named Kelce while discussing infidelity, making the widely shared post misleading and unsubstantiated.

Travis Kelce and Kayla Nicole viral claim falls apart under scrutiny

Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift continue life together as public interest remains high

A viral social media post has once again pulled Travis Kelce , Kayla Nicole and Taylor Swift into the spotlight, but this time for claims that simply do not hold up. The post alleges that Nicole caught Kelce having a secret affair with one of her friends, sacrificed millions for their relationship, and later said someone else "got the happy ending. " However, there is no credible evidence supporting any of those accusations. Readers should treat the circulating post as misinformation rather than fact.The social media post quickly gained millions of views by presenting dramatic allegations as though they were established facts. It claimed Kayla Nicole discovered Travis Kelce in a secret affair with one of her friends, gave up the entire $5 million she earned from YouTube during their relationship, and later reflected on the breakup with emotional remarks.Yet none of those claims have been verified.Even the Community Notes attached to the viral post points out that there are no verified reports showing Nicole made those allegations or the quoted statements. It also notes that while Nicole has spoken publicly about experiences with infidelity in past relationships, she never identified Kelce as the person involved.Likewise, there is no reliable evidence that she sacrificed "$5 million from YouTube" for Kelce.That figure appears to have been added to make the story more sensational.The viral post also attributes the following remarks to Nicole:“I helped create the man the world loves.”“Someone else got the happy ending.”There is no verified record of Kayla Nicole making those statements in connection with Travis Kelce.The episode is another reminder that highly emotional celebrity stories often spread much faster than the facts. Social media engagement does not make a claim true, and readers should rely on credible reporting before accepting such narratives.The false rumor has surfaced at a time when public curiosity surrounding Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift remains strong. Their relationship continues to attract widespread attention, with fans closely following their public appearances and personal milestones.However, it is important to separate verified developments from online speculation. While rumors about the couple frequently circulate across social media, readers should rely on confirmed reporting rather than viral posts that lack evidence.The same standard applies to stories involving Kayla Nicole. Discussions about her past relationship with Kelce often resurface online, but old narratives are frequently repackaged with fabricated quotes and unsupported allegations to generate clicks.In this case, there is no verified evidence that Kayla Nicole accused Travis Kelce of having an affair with her friend, no proof that she sacrificed $5 million in YouTube earnings for him, and no confirmation that she made the widely shared quotes attributed to her. The viral post is another reminder that popularity on social media is not the same as factual reporting.
Article Summary: A viral post falsely claimed Kayla Nicole accused Travis Kelce of cheating with her friend and sacrificing $5 million for him. There is no verified evidence supporting the affair allegations, financial claims, or attributed quotes. Nicole never publicly named Kelce while discussing infidelity, making the widely shared post misleading and unsubstantiated.

Article Title: “Three-against-one situation”: El Rubius opens up on being “targeted” in MrBeast’s viral $1M challenge
Article Text:
El Rubius reacted honestly after his elimination from MrBeast’s $1 million challenge, calling it “unfair” and claiming he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings. His response felt real and balanced, especially after MrBeast’s team later sent him a cake, softening the moment.

El Rubius reflects on a tough and “unfair” exit







El Rubius did not just walk away from MrBeast’s $1 million streamer challenge. He opened up. Soon after his elimination, the Spanish creator shared a raw reaction with fans, giving them a closer look at what the experience felt like from inside the game. It was not polished or carefully framed. It felt real, and that is exactly why it caught attention so quickly.The clip and his response have since fueled conversations across the streaming space. Some viewers believe intense competitions like this naturally lead to uneven situations. Others feel Rubius may have had a point about being singled out. Either way, his words have added a human layer to a challenge that many only saw as entertainment.Speaking through an Instagram Story, Rubius did not hide his frustration, but he also made sure to thank his supporters. He said, "Guys, I just got knocked out of the game. It was a bit of an unfair elimination, but hey, at least I managed to walk away with $50,000 for you all, which I’ve already distributed. It went to the mods, the subs, and the non-subs alike."He further added, "I’m happy, of course, though admittedly, it was incredibly tough.I wasn't really a fan of the challenge itself, either. But then again... it was basically a three-against-one situation the entire time. I mean, they were targeting me specifically the whole way through. I kept trying to go after RaKai, but, well, he actually just got eliminated in the end. So, at least justice was served for Abraham. Abraham, if you’re watching this, we were all rooting for you, and standing right there with you."His message carried mixed emotions. There was disappointment, yes, but also pride in how he handled things. Giving away his $50,000 winnings to his community stood out as a gesture that meant more than the result itself.He continued with another honest note, saying, "And in the end, karma finally caught up with that little punk. Sorry, I’m being a bit toxic right now, but let's just hope the MrBeast team doesn't see this! Guys, thank you all so much. Seriously, thank you for all the support and for just being there."He added, "Every time I asked for something in the chat or whatever it was, you guys were right there. You’re incredible. I’m a little disappointed in myself, personally, mostly for not performing better, but hey, I gave it my all, and we still walked away with $50,000, so we’ve got to look on the bright side. All right, guys, big hugs to all my brothers out there!"Interestingly, the story did not end with frustration. Later that day, Rubius revealed that MrBeast’s team had sent him a cake after his exit. It was a small gesture, but it shifted the mood. It showed that even in a high-pressure challenge, there is still room for respect.In the end, Rubius’ reaction felt honest and grounded. That is what stayed with people.
Article Summary: El Rubius was eliminated from MrBeast's $1 million streamer challenge. He called it "unfair" and said he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings.
